passiveAbilities.name: Erosion
passiveAbilities.description: Enemies within 4” suffer -1 Melee Stat when declaring a Melee Attack action or -2 Melee Stat if targeting this character with a Melee Attack action.

passiveAbilities.name: Cavalry Mace
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing Melee Dmg, reduce the Dmg to W. If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Concealed Armour
passiveAbilities.description: If this character suffers Piercing Dmg, reduce the Dmg suffered by -1.

activeAbilities.name: Intrusion
activeAbilities.description: After dice are rolled to determine who activates first, this model may spend 1 energy to reroll its die.

activeAbilities.name: Fear
activeAbilities.description: Target other character loses 1 energy then a friendly model within 4" of this character gains that much energy

signatureMove.name: Impale
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Move this model 1" directly towards the enemy
